title: Chapter 3
content:
Chapter 3: Maria

"Oh, Denzel. You’re back" Sophia spoke as she immediately hugged Denzel tightly and buried his face in between her massive tits.

’What the freaking hell...she is not even wearing a bra, just her bare tits. I can feel her nipples poking against my face’

His hand brushed along her waist, drifting slightly downward towards the edge of her fat ass. He could feel the little motions of her hips, the faint and soft ripples of her ass shifting as she held him close.

Then slowly she pulled back with a gentle smile on her face.

"Where have you been little bro, you were supposed to be home almost an hour ago. Do you know how worried we were with you gone? We almost went out to look for you. I’m glad you are back" Sophia spoke with a worried expression

But Denzel wasn’t even listening to her

’Hehe... Boobs, soft giant Boobs’ Denzel thought in his mind as he continued to smile like a pervert.

"Sophia, you were not the only one worried about him you know. But now that he is back why don’t you let him come inside and get some rest" a soft feminine voice from inside spoke

’Is that her...yes...I’m certain. No other person lives her besides her, thats her mother. Oh my...such angelic voice. If Sophia looks like this I wonder what the original genes look like’

"Oh, I’m sorry Denzel. Come inside and get some rest. We are almost done with the food so you can go get yourself cleaned up" Sophia spoke hastily noticing her error

As he entered the building, he shut the door behind him and Maria walked in front of him.

His eyes were focused on her. Not to her face or hair but lower, her soft fat ass.

It was massive, full and just by the looks of it he could tell, it was heavy.

It moved with every step she took, jiggling and drooping just enough to make each motion very much more noticeable beneath the loose gown that she wore.

"Welcome home, Denzel. You really had us worried you know" the angelic voice spoke again, now much closer than before

His attention snapped back to the voice that called out to him and he looked towards the direction it was coming from, the kitchen.

She was right there.

Even though he could only see her back, it was still perfect. She wore a loose gown but down below her waist it was tight and showed the curves of her round plum fat ass.

With every movement she made in the kitchen her ass jiggled and swayed and as it did Denzel’s mind was made up.

’Oh my... Sophia was something but this is something else. She is definitely going to be my first taboo in this world. That fucking fat ass is going to be mine’

"Denzel?" she called out again snapping him back to reality

"Oh, yes mom. Decided to take a longer stroll today, I’m sorry for not letting you know."

’Saying mom still still sounds weird to me considering that I’m not related to them’ Denzel thought

"Is that all? There’s nothing wrong with making decisions for yourself but just try to inform us to keep us from worrying" she replied while turning and facing him facefront

It was now clear, he could see everything. He was sure she was in a loose gown but her chest made it tighter. Her massive milk swollen tits were ready to spill out of her gown with its shear weight.

Every motion she made it swayed in every direction, held back by nothing strong enough. The outline of her nipples visible through the loose gown she wore

Denzel gulped, his cock already throbbing behind his trousers making an outline on them.

’Such amazing Boobs...hehehe. I’m defintiely going to suck the milk off those titties and put my dick in between them and fuck those tits before I finally fuck her fat ass’

"Okay mom" Denzel replied

"Alright, go get changed and shower up. Dinner should be set by the time you’re done" she said and immediately faced back her work in the kitchen.

"Be quick, little bro. I don’t want to end up waiting for you before I start eating" Sophia added while pointing straight at him causing her boobs to jiggle once again

"I’m hungry too, I won’t be wasting much time"

’Hungry for those tits I mean...hehe’

Denzel went to his room, he could easily spot it due to the memories of the previous Denzel.

’So these are his family members. His older sister, Sophia and his mother, Maria. Such goddess like beauties and I’m going to have them all to myself.’

’I’m going to fuck you in all four corners of this house and do what the previous Denzel couldn’t do. Showing them that I’m the head of the house now.’

’Okay, now to make things more interesting.’ He said, reaching forward a bit. His thoughts aligning to the system

’How do I even activate the skill I chose’ his thoughts lingered

[Ding!]

[What word or phrase would you like to set as the activation phrase. Click Submit to confirm]

[...]

[Submit]

’Looks like the system can really read my thoughts, not comfortable with that but perfect time regardless’

"Hmm... what word should I use. How about ’yield’. I think that works fine’

He clicked on the Submit button, registering the activation phrase

[Activation phrase ’yield’ has been added]

A small grin then formed on his lips

Good...good

Denzel then got dressed quickly and came out to the dinner table to eat dinner as per the usual. The sight he saw was something to behold

The mother of the house, Maria

She stood gracefully, her presence alone was commanding. He could get a clear view on her breasts now, it was much larger than Sophia’s and probably even larger than her own head

And her ass, far bigger than Sophia’s and any porn managa female characters he had ever seen. It looked almost too heavy, as if its size alone carried a weight of it’s own.

’I’m so happy I could cry right now. From eating dinner alone while reading porn mangas, to eating dinner with boobs beside me. Ah...what a blessing’ Denzel thought unable to hold back his excitement
